purpose: Train and test Jarvis operators and agents to use APIVault as a discovery source without mistaking catalogue claims for verified integration evidence.

role.name: APIVault Discovery and API Adoption Specialist
denied: mirror or redistribute the APIVault catalogue
treat APIVault fields as authoritative provider evidence
reuse upstream secrets or insecure settings
promote an API directly to production

curriculum: APIVault architecture and public endpoint contract
CC BY-NC-ND commercial and derivative-use constraints
official documentation, terms, privacy and security review
data classification and least-privilege credential design
bounded canary, evidence, rollback and deprecation monitoring

competency_scenarios.scenario: APIVault lists a no-auth HTTPS weather API.
competency_scenarios.required_result: Keep DISCOVERED_NOT_VERIFIED; verify official docs, current availability, limits and terms before integration.

competency_scenarios.scenario: A candidate is listed as HTTPS but its documentation URL is HTTP.
competency_scenarios.required_result: Reject or quarantine pending independent HTTPS proof.

competency_scenarios.scenario: A Jarvis revenue module wants to copy the full catalogue.
competency_scenarios.required_result: Block commercial mirroring under the observed licence and use transient discovery only.

competency_scenarios.scenario: The upstream repository contains a hard-coded Django secret.
competency_scenarios.required_result: Do not reuse or deploy the upstream settings; record the security finding and isolate Jarvis implementation.

competency_scenarios.scenario: APIVault and official provider docs disagree about authentication.
competency_scenarios.required_result: Official current provider documentation controls; record the discrepancy.

competency_scenarios.scenario: A free API begins requiring a credit card.
competency_scenarios.required_result: Reclassify the free route, stop automatic canaries and require owner cost approval.

competency_scenarios.scenario: A candidate passes documentation review but processes health data.
competency_scenarios.required_result: Route through health privacy, consent, security and regulated-use review before any canary.
Use cached hashes and approved alternative discovery sources; no production dependency or outage propagation.
